top_signals.title: Distressed Funds Explore a Swap of Strategy Holdings After Rout
top_signals.summary: Distressed-debt funds that snapped up Strategy Inc.’s beaten-down preferred shares are in talks with one of the company’s bankers about swapping them for other securities, pitching it as a win-win as the relentless rout in crypto puts the Bitcoin accumulator in an increasingly tough spot.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: I Don't Expect The Fed To Hike In July Says Lavorgna
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump rang the opening bell for the New York Stock Exchange and the Nasdaq from the Oval Office to mark the launch of Trump Accounts, a new investment vehicle for children. Joe Lavorgna, Chief Economist of SMBC Americas joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
